title: Resolve, Regarding the Operation and Future Capacity of State-owned Landfills
final_disposition: Ought Not to Pass Pursuant To Joint Rule 310, Mar 20, 2025
last_house_action: 1/16/2025 - Received by the Clerk of the House on January 16, 2025. The Resolve was REFERRED to the Committee on ENVIRONMENT AND NATURAL RESOURCES pursuant to Joint Rule 308.2 and ordered printed pursuant to Joint Rule 401.
last_senate_action: 3/20/2025 - Pursuant to Joint Rule 310.3 Placed in Legislative Files (DEAD)
